title: Our packages
subtitle: A fixed price per slot, no surprises. If there's no booking after yours, stay as long as you want.

privacy.title: Total privacy
privacy.description: No overlooking neighbours — nobody can see the pool. Perfect for moments with friends, family, or women-only groups in complete serenity.
privacy.women: Women-only groups welcome — enjoy a 100% private space.

morning.name: Morning
morning.description: Sunny swim, fresh and relaxed vibes.

afternoon.name: Afternoon
afternoon.description: The perfect slot to make the most of the sunshine.

evening.name: Evening
evening.description: Sunset vibes and the LED ambiance kicks in.

night.name: Night
night.description: Immersive LED experience, unique and intimate atmosphere.

stayLonger: No booking after? Stay as long as you want!

food.title: Meal Add-on
food.subtitle: Chef's choice menu — homemade with love.

items.name: Main course
items.description: A homemade dish, inspired by the chef's mood

items.name: Starter + Main + Dessert
items.description: The full menu for a gourmet experience

events.title: Ceremonies & Events
events.subtitle: Parties, celebrations...
events.description: Want to host a ceremony or private event by the pool? Parties with friends, family celebrations... Anything is possible! Enjoy a private space with pool, on-site catering and the perfect setting to create unforgettable memories. Contact us directly via WhatsApp or message to discuss the details and plan your custom event.

takeaway.title: Takeaway Orders
takeaway.subtitle: Homemade, ready to pick up.
takeaway.description: Want to take home a platter of treats after your swim, or simply order without booking the pool? We prepare on order mini sandwiches, mini burgers, fricassé sandwiches and many more. Contact us via WhatsApp or message to place your order and arrange the details.
takeaway.examplesSavoury: Savoury: mini sandwiches, mini burgers, fricassé sandwiches & more

booking.title: Booking & Cancellation
booking.deposit: A €10 deposit is required to confirm your booking, via Wero, Revolut or PayPal. This amount will be deducted from the total on the day.
booking.cancel: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before the slot.
booking.cancelLate: Late cancellation? If no one had booked your slot during your reservation, we'll refund the €10 anyway. We keep it fair.
